message:
fix: add BEADS_TEST_MODE=1 to convoy store tests to prevent DB pollution

convoy/store_test.go was connecting to the production Dolt server as
database beads because BEADS_TEST_MODE was not set. This caused test
data to accumulate in the production database. Setting BEADS_TEST_MODE=1
ensures tests use isolated testdb_hash databases and skip gracefully
when no test server is available.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -16,6 +16,8 @@ import (
 func setupTestStore(t *testing.T) (beadsdk.Storage, func()) {
 	t.Helper()
 
+	t.Setenv("BEADS_TEST_MODE", "1")
+
 	dir := t.TempDir()
 	beadsDir := filepath.Join(dir, ".beads")
 	doltPath := filepath.Join(beadsDir, "dolt")
